data.title: Block Inc.: Buy Rating Affirmed Amid Growth Potential and Strategic Clarity
data.description:
Analyst Bryan Bergin from TD Cowen reiterated a Buy rating on Block and keeping the price target at $91.00.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Bryan Bergin has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that highlight Block’s potential for future growth and value. The company is set to host its first Investor Day since 2022, which is expected to provide clarity on its financial outlook and strategic direction. Despite recent share pressure, Block’s strong performance in the third quarter and an optimistic outlook for fiscal year 2025 suggest that the stock is currently undervalued.
Bergin anticipates that Block’s accelerating momentum, particularly in Cash App and Square, will support a favorable 2026 outlook, aligning with or exceeding market expectations. The company’s product development and go-to-market execution are expected to enhance its medium-term financial prospects, with potential for earnings and free cash flow growth that will appeal to long-term investors. Additionally, Block’s adherence to the ‘Rule of 40’ framework and potential improvements in its financial profile post-2026 further reinforce the Buy rating.

According to TipRanks, Bergin is an analyst with an average return of -1.1% and a 44.09% success rate. Bergin covers the Technology sector, focusing on stocks such as Block, Accenture, and Globant SA.

In another report released yesterday, BTIG also reiterated a Buy rating on the stock with a $90.00 price target.

data.title: Circle Internet Group: Strong Market Position and Growth Potential with USDC Expansion
data.description:
Canaccord Genuity analyst Joseph Vafi maintained a Buy rating on Circle Internet Group, Inc. Class A yesterday and set a price target of $247.00.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Joseph Vafi has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that highlight Circle Internet Group’s strong market position and growth potential. The company has consistently delivered on its promises since its IPO, maintaining a leading role in the compliant stablecoin market with USDC. In the third quarter, USDC circulation grew significantly, surpassing management’s growth expectations and increasing its market share.
Circle’s strategic focus on expanding its technology stack aims to enhance the stablecoin’s use beyond just a trading pair, positioning it as a foundational “money layer” for the internet. This ambition to disrupt the traditional M2 money supply underscores the company’s long-term potential. Furthermore, the recent distribution agreement with Binance is contributing to USDC’s circulation growth, and the increasing transaction volume market share serves as a testament to Circle’s innovative approach in the evolving stablecoin landscape.

According to TipRanks, Vafi is a 5-star analyst with an average return of 31.2% and a 49.02% success rate. Vafi covers the Technology sector, focusing on stocks such as Circle Internet Group, Inc. Class A, Strategy, and Blend Labs.

In another report released yesterday, Mizuho Securities also upgraded the stock to a Buy with a $100.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
